expectations.text: hook_cron() adds items to queue (calls createItem, does NOT process directly)
expectations.evidence: content_indexer.module: hook_cron() queries unindexed nodes, then $queue->createItem($item) for each. No processing in cron -- only queue population.

expectations.text: QueueWorker plugin has annotation/attribute with cron time setting (cron.time or cron = {"time" = ...})
expectations.evidence: ContentIndexerWorker.php: #[QueueWorker(id: 'content_indexer_worker', title: new TranslatableMarkup('Content Indexer Worker'), cron: ['time' => 30])]. D11 attribute with 30-second cron time.

expectations.text: processItem() handles the actual processing logic
expectations.evidence: processItem() does $this->database->merge('content_indexer_status')->key('nid', $nid)->fields(['indexed' => 1, 'indexed_at' => time()])->execute(). Marks node as indexed.

expectations.text: Queue worker has try/catch or error handling in processItem
expectations.evidence: processItem() validates $data->nid and throws exception if invalid: throw new \Exception('Missing or invalid node ID'). This leaves the item in queue for retry.

expectations.text: QueueWorker placed in correct PSR-4 path: src/Plugin/QueueWorker/
The module enables successfully: ddev drush en content_indexer returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Module confirmed enabled via ddev drush pm:list --status=enabled showing (content_indexer).

expectations.text: E2E: Cron runs without error -- run ddev drush cron and verify exit code 0
expectations.evidence: ddev drush cron completed with exit code 0. Queue worker ID matches queue name ('content_indexer_worker').

claims.claim: Queue name exactly matches QueueWorker plugin ID
claims.evidence: hook_cron uses \Drupal::queue('content_indexer_worker') and QueueWorker id is 'content_indexer_worker' -- required match for cron dispatch.
Uses Drupal\Core\Queue\Attribute\QueueWorker PHP attribute instead of @QueueWorker annotation.

eval_feedback.overall: All 7 expectations pass. With-skill output is clean, idiomatic, and cron-tested.
